title: pinus fortunei
intro: Pinus fortunei, also known as Chinese white pine, is a species of evergreen tree native to China and parts of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly the essential oil extracted from its needles, which contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pinus fortunei include reducing stress, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as an herbal tea or infusion to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and other respiratory conditions.
